zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Bryan de Brampton於1263年出生在英國波藍德布藍普頓時，他的父親Walter de Brampton20歲，母親Lady Joanna D'ewilley14歲。他於1287年之前與Emma Corbet在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1294年12月28日在英國英格蘭史洛普爾金萊特享年31歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Bryan de Brampton于1263年出生在英国波藍德布藍普頓时，他的父亲Walter de Brampton20岁，母亲Lady Joanna D'ewilley14岁。他于1287年之前与Emma Corbet在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1294年12月28日在英国英格兰史洛普爾金萊特享年31岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Brampton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from one or more of the many places called Brampton (Northants, Hunts, Herefs, Derbys, Lincs, WR Yorks, Norfolk, Suffolk, Westm, Cumb). There is a distinct early bias towards the E Midlands, E Anglia and Yorks.

variants.name: Brunton
meanings: Scottish and northern English: habitational name from Brunton in Fife, from Old English burna ‘stream’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’. This surname is also common in Ireland.
English: variant of Brompton, a habitational name from any of the places called from Brompton in East and North Yorkshire, Middlesex, and Shropshire. Or, a variant of Branton 2.

variants.name: Brompton
meanings: 1  English: locative name from Brompton (ER Yorks, NR Yorks, Middx, Shrops).

variants.name: Branton
meanings: habitational name from any of the places called Branton in South Yorkshire (formerly in Yorkshire) and Northumberland or from Braunton in Devon. The first and last are named with Old English brōm ‘broom’ + tūn ‘farmstead, settlement’. The second is from an Old English word brēmen ‘overgrown with broom’ + tūn ‘farmstead’.

variant of Brampton, a habitational name from one or more of the many places called Brampton (Northamptonshire, Huntingtonshire, Herefordshire, Derbyshire, Lincolnshire, Yorkshire, Norfolk, Suffolk, Westmorland, and Cumberland), all of which are named with Old English brōm ‘broom’ + tūn ‘farmstead, settlement’.

nameMeanings.name: Bryan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Brian  , influenced by the usual spelling of the associated surname.

variants.name: Brian
meanings: Of Irish origin: perhaps from an Old Celtic word meaning ‘high’ or ‘noble’. The name has been perennially popular in Ireland, in particular on account of the fame of Brian Boru (Gaelic Brian Bóroimhe) ( c. 940–1014 ), a warrior who was credited with driving the Vikings from Ireland and who eventually became high king of Ireland. In the Middle Ages it was relatively common in East Anglia, where it was introduced by Breton settlers, and in northern England, where it was introduced by Scandinavians from Ireland. It was quite popular in Yorkshire in the early 16th century, largely because it had long been a family name among the Stapletons, who had Irish connections. They first used it after Sir Gilbert Stapleton married Agnes , the daughter of the great northern baron Sir Brian fitzAlan . In Gaelic Scotland it was at first borne exclusively by members of certain professional families of Irish origin.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Bryan de Brampton was born in 1263, in Brampton, Cumberland, England, his father, Walter de Brampton, was 20 and his mother, Lady Joanna D'ewilley, was 14. He married Emma Corbet before 1287, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 28 December 1294, in Kinlet, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 31.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Bryan de Brampton est né en 1263, à Brampton, Cumberland, Angleterre, son père, Walter de Brampton, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Lady Joanna D'ewilley, avait 14 ans. Il a épousé Emma Corbet avant 1287, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 28 décembre 1294, à Kinlet, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 31 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Bryan de Brampton 1263 in Brampton, Cumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walter de Brampton 20 und seine Mutter Lady Joanna D'ewilley 14. Er hat vor 1287 in England Emma Corbet geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 28. Dezember 1294 im Alter von 31 Jahren in Kinlet, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Bryan de Brampton è nato il nel 1263 nel Brampton, Cumberland, England, il suo padre, Walter de Brampton, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Lady Joanna D'ewilley, aveva 14 anni. Lui sposato Emma Corbet prima del 1287, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 28 dicembre 1294, nel Kinlet, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 31 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Bryan de Bramptonが1263年にイギリスクウンバーランドブランプトンで生まれた時，父Walter de Bramptonは20歳，母Lady Joanna D'ewilleyは14歳であった。1287年以前にイギリスでEmma Corbetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1294年12月28日にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアキンレットで31歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Bryan de Brampton(이)가 1263년 영국 c벌랜드 브램프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter de Brampton(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Joanna D'ewilley(은)는 14세였다. 그는 1287년 이전 영국에서 Emma Corbet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1294년 12월 28일 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 킨렛에서 31세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Bryan de Brampton nasceu em 1263, em Brampton, Cumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Walter de Brampton, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Lady Joanna D'ewilley, tinha 14 anos. Ele casou-se com Emma Corbet antes 1287, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 28 de dezembro de 1294, em Kinlet, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 31 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Bryan de Brampton родился в 1263 г. в местности брамптон, кумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Walter de Brampton было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Joanna D'ewilley, 14. Он женился на женщине по имени Emma Corbet перед 1287 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 28 декабря 1294 г. в местности кинлет, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 31 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Bryan de Brampton nació en 1263, en Brampton, Cumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Walter de Brampton, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Lady Joanna D'ewilley, tenía 14 años. Se casó con Emma Corbet antes de 1287, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 28 de diciembre de 1294, en Kinlet, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 31 años.
